These are events that did not result in harm but had the potential to cause injury or illness. Reporting such events is crucial for preventive measures. Employers are encouraged to document these occurrences in the Registre Santé Sécurité au Travail (Occupational Health and Safety Register) to analyze risks and implement corrective actions.
